title: BrightBlink
text: BrightBlink Specifies the foreground or background color (as determined by the .ini file section) used to display the brightblink Uniface screen attribute. BrightBlink = RGBColor Default value: Depends on file section. File section: [background] and [foreground] brightblink=128,128,128, 0,0,128, 0,128,0, 0,128,128, 128,0,0, 128,0,128, 128,128,0, 128,128,128 Copy Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
